{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201643560CC3E56070953DF4AE05\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374331620449010470","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书让我想起了和爷爷聊天时，他总是能把过去的事情讲得生动有趣。历史就像一面镜子，它不仅记录了过去的兴衰荣辱，还能让我们从中学到很多经验和教训。作者的论述深刻而独到，让我对历史有了更深入的思考。我觉得这本书不仅适合专业人士阅读，也适合像我这样对历史感兴趣的人。它就像是一位亲切的朋友，和你分享他对历史的热爱和见解。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716252470,"group_id":"7316066848485674023","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"从哪里来的天长，遇到的仅有海誓山盟。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+XrEZbOeGZ3euTNVxO9ADSyI/wDxz50Q8pMDzZIt1eh","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aee69748ff034316beab4fb1ec91d374~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776531281\u0026x-signature=mzJflm7VkhHb2EZWrAeDAouEoBQ%3D","user_id":"4020281610091070","user_name":"没浪够"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4020281610091070","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7316066848485674023","book_info":{"abstract":"本书是霍布斯鲍姆的史学理论文集。霍布斯鲍姆在书中探讨了历史的理论、实践及其发展和它与现代世界的联系。这些范围广泛的论文论述了历史的撰写、历史的滥用及历史学家责任的问题；论述了社会的历史和“来自下层的历史”；论述了马克思和当前历史研究的趋势和时尚；论述了欧洲、俄国革命及20世纪大部分时间里方兴未艾、堕落成性的普遍的野蛮。\n这些论文展示了这位伟大的历史学家对研究历史的热情洋溢的信念，以及深邃的分析、广博的论说和独到的见解，这些足以令他实至名归。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/d42851d1fc9ba057ed778c1fbac46933~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"（英）埃里克·霍布斯鲍姆","author_id":"","book_id":"7316066848485674023","book_name":"论历史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"174人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":62,\"name\":\"文化历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=62\u0026name=文化历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7316069538087308350","read_count":"16","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"274936"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"27","tags":"文化历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d42851d1fc9ba057ed778c1fbac46933~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779180236\u0026x-signature=Wa4WRNQ37IWwqkl4ZT5tIouRWuQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201643560CC3E56070953DF4AE05\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11220,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":140},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7316066848485674023","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":2,"score_text":"2人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"202603201643560CC3E56070953DF4AE05","message":"请求成功"}
